channel.title: vim on Look back on myself
channel.description: Recent content in vim on Look back on myself

item.description: Look back my workflow I found my workflow seemed not so elegant. I learned many insightes with following URL. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=1kThUbSdlro It seemed alias git seemed awesome, such as git as g. Moreover, using commitizen seemed easier to record commit log, I should try to include it in my work flow. Also vim and tmux combination seemed awesome with vim-fugitive plugin. Using, it you can operate some commands log, brame etc in your Vim terminal.
